title: viola × oenipontana
intro: Viola × oenipontana, also known as the alpine pansy or alpine pansy viola, is a hybrid flowering plant that combines characteristics of both Viola alpina and Viola lactea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Viola × oenipontana include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural antiseptic. Viola × oenipontana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
